name: Nepal Tour
overview: Explore the best of Kathmandu, Pokhara with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.description:
Arrival in Kathmandu: 
Upon arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, you will receive a warm welcome and be
transferred to your hotel in Kathmandu. After check-in, take some time to relax. In the
In the evening, explore the vibrant streets of Thamel at your leisure. Overnight stay in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title:
Kathmandu Sightseeing
Immerse yourself in Kathmandu’s rich cultural heritage wit
itinerary.description:
Kathmandu Sightseeing
Immerse yourself in Kathmandu’s rich cultural heritage with a full-day sightseeing tour. Start
your day with visits to Pashupatinath Temple and Guheshwori Temple. Continue to
Boudhanath Stupa, one of the largest stupas in the world. In the afternoon, explore
Swayambhunath Stupa, also known as the Monkey Temple, before concluding the day at
Kathmandu Durbar Square, a historic palace complex showcasing traditional Nepalese
architecture. Overnight stay in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title:
Nagarkot – Bhaktapur – Kathmandu
Early Morning: Drive to Nagarkot, a hill statio
itinerary.description:
Nagarkot – Bhaktapur – Kathmandu
Early Morning: Drive to Nagarkot, a hill station known for its breathtaking sunrise views
over the Himalayas. On a clear day, you may even see Mount Everest.
Morning: After breakfast, travel to Bhaktapur, an ancient city rich in history, culture, and
traditional Newari heritage.
Midday: Explore Bhaktapur Durbar Square, a UNESCO-listed heritage site renowned for its
intricate architecture. Visit Nyatapola Temple, Bhairavnath Temple, and other historic
landmarks ad

itinerary.description:
Departure from Kathmandu
After breakfast at your hotel, you will be transferred to Tribhuvan International Airport for
your departure, carrying unforgettable memories of Nepal’s stunning landscapes, spiritual
landmarks, and vibrant culture.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
